---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's awkward or impossible today?

## Proposed Solution

What would solve it? Sketch the surface — syntax, CLI flag, API,
extension behavior, whatever applies.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Scope

- [ ] Compiler change
- [ ] Stdlib addition
- [ ] CLI / tooling
- [ ] Extension
- [ ] Documentation

## Note

Language-level changes (grammar, type system, effect system, public
CLI surface) require an RFC. See CONTRIBUTING.md → "Proposing
Language Changes".
